name: EDOM
description: EDOM is a blockchain-based gaming ecosystem built on Polygon that enables users to generate sustainable income through play-to-earn gameplay. The project combines entertainment with real economic opportunity by implementing a true Play-to-Earn model where user participation is directly linked to rewards. EDOM tokens serve as the primary utility token for in-game transactions, item acquisitions, upgrades, and marketplace activities. The ecosystem features multiple revenue streams including gameplay rewards, NFT-based in-game items, skill-based competitions, and a peer-to-peer marketplace where players can exchange assets. EDOM's infrastructure supports real-time transactions, economic stability through tokenomics design, and global expansion through multilingual support and localized communities. The platform is designed for economic freedom, allowing players to transfer earnings to external exchanges and maintain control over their digital assets. With a roadmap including official game launch (2025.10), wallet integration (2026.06), and eSports expansion (2027.06), EDOM aims to establish a comprehensive blockchain gaming economy where entertainment and earning potential are seamlessly integrated.
